name: Ace Pickleball Club
description: Come play pickleball at Ace Pickleball Club in Voorhees, NJ! There are 7 indoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are available. Amenities include food, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, water, and restrooms.
